zh.Hall Manor, Lanteglos, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾藍特格洛斯 白 福維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Reginald de Mohun於1303年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特時，他的父親John de Mohun IV34歲，母親Ada de Tibetot31歲。他和Elizabeth Fitzwilliam至少有1個兒子。他去世於1347年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾藍特格洛斯 白 福維享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Reginald de Mohun was born in 1303, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Mohun IV, was 34 and his mother, Ada de Tibetot, was 31. He had at least 1 son with Elizabeth Fitzwilliam. He died in 1347, in Lanteglos by Fowey, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Reginald de Mohun est né en 1303, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Mohun IV, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Ada de Tibetot, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Elizabeth Fitzwilliam. Il est décédé en 1347, à Lanteglos by Fowey, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Reginald de Mohunが1303年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父John de Mohun IVは34歳，母Ada de Tibetotは31歳であった。彼はElizabeth Fitzwilliamとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1347年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルランテグロス ビー フォウエイで44歳で死去した。

ko.Hall Manor, Lanteglos, Cornwall, England: 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 랜티그로스 비 파베이
ko.lifeSummary: Lord Reginald de Mohun(이)가 1303년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Mohun IV(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada de Tibetot(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Fitzwilliam(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1347년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 랜티그로스 비 파베이에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Reginald de Mohun родился в 1303 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Mohun IV было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Ada de Tibetot, 31. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Elizabeth Fitzwilliam. Он умер в 1347 г. в местности лантеглос би фоуи, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.
